full_text:
📌 Färkkilä Lab – Credit Card & Ordering FAQ

1️⃣ After purchasing with the lab credit card

✔️ Email the invoice/receipt to saundarya.shah@helsinki.fi
 ✔️ Do NOT Slack + email — email only
 ✔️ Add the WBS
 ➡️ If unsure, ask joonas.jukonen@helsinki.fi or Slack him
 ✔️ If multiple participants: list all names, WBS, and amounts

Example:
 Airbnb accommodation for XXX conference, Berlin
 • H3000/7300506 – Shabanova Alexandra – EUR XXX (icandoc)
 • H3000/7300506 – Liang Zhihan – EUR XXX (icandoc)
 • H30492/1339805 – Hincapié-Otero María M. – EUR XXX

2️⃣ Purchasing food items with the credit card

Include the following in your email:

Purpose (e.g. "UH-Harvard collaboration meeting servings 12.6.2025")

Purchase date

Total amount

WBS

Full participant list

Example:
 Refreshments for Lab Meeting & Team Building Day – 12.6.2025

Purchase date: 10.06.2025

Amount: EUR XXX

WBS: H30492 / 4709391

Participants: Elomaa A., Elomaa H., Färkkilä A., Hainari A., Hincapié-Otero M., Holappa E., Jukonen J., Lundgren A., Osara E., Palomino S., Peltola A., Perez F., Ruuska E., Shah S., Suoknuuti A., Toivanen A., Chen W., Launonen I.M.

3️⃣ For invoices from restaurants/hotels

If using icandoc or a researcher’s own fund

Provide WBS like this:
 • H3000/7300506 – Last Name/ First Name – EUR XXX (icandoc)
 → Add participant names if more than one.

When the invoice arrives:
 Forward it to SAUSHAH in SAP.
 Saundarya will record it and send it for authorization.

If using a lab WBS

Use this exact format so it routes correctly in SAP:
 WBS: H30492 / 4709391 / Shah Saundarya
 (Note: last name first)
